sections.paragraph:
Original: פּרעתון

Transliteration: pir‛âthôn

Phonetic: pir-aw-thone'

BDB Definition:

Pirathon = "princely"
  1. a town in Ephraim in the mount of the Amalekite
    1. perhaps modern 'Ferata' located 1.5 miles (2.5 kilometers) south from Jaffa on the road to Nablus

Origin: from H6546

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
